_source: Carried from KW_Data_2026-04-13. Amazon.com domain not scraped (automated run). PPC data estimated from SC_Data_2026-04-14 campaign totals. BSR estimated based on 1 fountain sale today.

tracked_keywords._notes: Third consecutive conversion week. ACoS 43.2% — still above 33.5% breakeven but showing consistent conversion signal. Hold bids for one more week before scaling.

tracked_keywords.keyword: cat water fountain stainless steel wireless
tracked_keywords._notes: 2nd consecutive week BELOW breakeven (32.4% vs 33.5%). Most efficient keyword. Strong signal to increase bid 10-15%.
EXP-023 queued to add 'small dogs' to title. Add as exact match keyword at $1.20 bid.

tracked_keywords.keyword: automatic dog water fountain stainless steel
tracked_keywords._notes: Dog-focused keyword — not currently targeted. Add after title test (EXP-023).

tracked_keywords.keyword: water fountain for small dogs wireless
tracked_keywords._notes: Low volume dog variant — add with EXP-023 implementation.

tracked_keywords.keyword: wireless stainless steel pet water fountain
tracked_keywords._notes: Pet-focused variant — zero conversions for 2 consecutive weeks. Consider pausing if no conversion in next 7 days.
Auto campaign — zero conversions. Auto campaign pause would eliminate this wasted spend ($7.50/week). Harvest search terms first.
7/10 competitors use 'battery operated'. High opportunity keyword. Untargeted for 12+ days. Priority add after auto campaign review.
Rechargeable variant — untargeted. High relevance to product.

bsr_tracker.bsr_note: BSR improved ~3,400 positions from yesterday on 1 estimated fountain sale today. 7-day improvement of ~20,200 positions — consistent trend with gradual rank recovery.

keyword_summary.wow_note: 3rd consecutive week with 2 converting keywords. Portfolio ACoS stable at 57%. BSR improving at ~3,400 positions/day. Next milestones: (1) pause auto campaign, (2) scale 'stainless steel wireless' bid, (3) add dog keywords post-EXP-023.
